description: Remitly is a digital financial services company focused on international money transfers and related cross-border payment services for consumers and businesses. Its website also includes country-specific transfer information, exchange-rate pages, and business payment offerings.
summary: Remitly.com publicly exposes consumer and business web pages, and public investor materials indicate a separate Remitly for Developers API exists at `developer.remitly.com`, but no developer documentation or machine-readable integration surface could be retrieved on `remitly.com` itself; no HTTP/GraphQL/MCP/CLI surfaces on remitly.com were confirmed.
